key_registry.lookup: Resolve by account_id and key_id at audit_attestation.signed_at. A key is valid only when valid_from <= signed_at and valid_until, revoked_at, and compromised_at are absent or strictly after signed_at.
key_registry.key_id: lowercase SHA-256 hex digest of canonical raw Ed25519 public key bytes

envelope.timestamp_rule: signed_at is a UTC ISO 8601 timestamp with microsecond precision and a Z suffix.
envelope.payload_type_rule: payload_type MUST equal permit.audit_attestation.v1. No other permit v2 signature slot may satisfy this claim.

canonical_payload.batch_binding: batch_id MUST equal envelope batch_id and resolve to a known audit batch in the pack.
canonical_payload.hash_rule: signed_payload_hash is the lowercase SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical signed payload bytes.

temporal_rules.not_before_permit: audit_attestation.signed_at MUST be greater than or equal to permit.valid_from.

verdicts.supported: envelope shape, payload type, payload hash, signer binding, batch binding, signing-time key resolution, not-before-permit rule, batch resolution, and signature verification are supported.
verdicts.disproved: payload type, payload hash, signer binding, batch binding, not-before-permit rule, batch resolution, or signature verification fails.
verdicts.insufficient_evidence: slot evidence, permit canonical inputs, account key registry evidence, signer identity, key id, signing timestamp, batch id, or signature material is missing.
verdicts.unverifiable_scope: permit format version, canonicalization profile, key-registry profile, audit-batch profile, or timestamp profile is unsupported.
